chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.S-75 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on CMA No.252/2024 (Ex/A) 3. For hearing of main case 02-5-2025 None present for the petitioner, nor has any intimation been received. However, perusal of record reflects that the petitioner has already approached the Court of the Additional Sessions Judge-II/ Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Ghotki where learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace vide order dated 08-1-2024, passed in Cr. Misc. Application No.12/2024, has provided protection to him but in spite of that he has approached this Court for protection. Since, protection has already been provided to the petitioner by learned Additional Sessions Judge-II/ Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Ghotki vide order dated 08-1-2024; thus, under the circumstances, the instant petition being not maintainable is hereby dismissed in limine along with listed application. J U D G E Naveed Ali
